title: best herbal teas for sleep disorder
description: Ginkgo biloba tea contains bioactive constituents such as flavonoids, terpenoids, and bilobalide, which have been shown to help alleviate symptoms of insomnia and improve sleep quality. The tea's antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties help to promote relaxation and reduce stress levels, making it easier to fall asleep and maintain a restful night's sleep.
